title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 29–31, this part focuses on Unknown person #22, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A mirage like before...? You've still only got one physical body!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right. One is me. The other four are illusions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: formed by reflections within the chilly atmosphere...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only one in five of these attacks are real...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's completely different from the old CLMA TACT.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just a simple thunder ball can deal this much damage....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: With my next big hit, you're finished!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm in complete control of the humidity and temperature...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The climate within this room is all mine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: What good is control-ling the climate...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: against a master of the six powers who exceeds human limits!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
